'''Toxus Li''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who was hunted down by [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Although many of Li's crew members fought in his defense and were killed by Fett, Li's bounty was the only one Fett was concerned about. When confronted by Fett in person, Li surrendered himself. When Fett told Li that the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was on his ''head'' alone, he meant it quite literally.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: When the Fat Lady Swings]]'' {{1st}}
